source: BTD Mod Helper game data export

upgrades.name: Quad Darts
upgrades.description: Shoots 4 darts per volley instead of 2.

upgrades.name: Pursuit
upgrades.description: A new targeting option enables Heli to seek and pursue the Bloons automatically.

upgrades.name: Razor Rotors
upgrades.description: Razor Rotor blades rip up Bloons on contact, including Lead and Frozen Bloons.

upgrades.name: Apache Dartship
upgrades.description: Adds a large missile array and powerful machine guns.

upgrades.name: Apache Prime
upgrades.description: The Apache Prime leaves most Bloons wishing they'd never been inflated.

upgrades.name: Bigger Jets
upgrades.description: Powerful jets make Heli move much faster.

upgrades.name: IFR
upgrades.description: Allows Heli Pilot to detect and shoot Camo Bloons.

upgrades.name: Downdraft
upgrades.description: Blows Bloons away from the Heli, back toward the entrance.

upgrades.name: Support Chinook
upgrades.description: Blows back many more Bloons and gains abilities: Drops lives and cash crates, and can pick up and redeploy most Monkey types.

upgrades.name: Special Poperations
upgrades.description: Deploys a powerful special Monkey Marine with a machine gun.

upgrades.name: Faster Darts
upgrades.description: Darts are propelled much faster through the air.

upgrades.name: Faster Firing
upgrades.description: Faster attack speed for all Heli attacks.

upgrades.name: MOAB Shove
upgrades.description: Can collide with and shove MOAB-class Bloons, reversing or slowing their movement. Shove is amplified by Bigger Jets and IFR upgrades.

upgrades.name: Comanche Defense
upgrades.description: Automatically calls in mini Comanches when they're most needed.

upgrades.name: Comanche Commander
upgrades.description: Upgraded weapons. Also automatically calls in 3 more Comanches. Permanently.
